reviews.comment:
La YPF ACA ! El lugar donde parar y descansar con un rico café y medialunas. Quesillos y artesanías. Un comedor cerca donde venden unas riquísimas empanada!.

(Translated by Google)
The YPF ACA! The perfect place to stop and relax with delicious coffee and croissants. Also available are cheeses and handicrafts. There's a nearby restaurant selling amazing empanadas!

reviews.comment:
Punto obligado para descansar, repostar y seguir viaje, los playeros excelente la atención, ojalá el ACA lo modernice y amplíe porque quedo chico el lugar.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop for resting, refueling and continuing your journey; the service staff are excellent. Hopefully, the ACA will modernize and expand it because the place has become too small.
